User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user profile within the application, which can be an individual, a football club, or a supporter club.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

nom.description: The name of the user or club.

ville.description: The city where the user or club is located.

description.description: A brief description or bio of the user or club.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

favoris.description: Array of Offer IDs favorited by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

isActive.description: A flag indicating if the user account is currently active.

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Represents an item, service, event, or matching request posted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Offer entity.

titre.description: The title or short summary of the offer.

description.description: A detailed description of the offer.

etat.description: The condition of the item (for sales/exchanges).

ville.description: The city associated with the offer's location.

commune.description: The commune (sub-locality) associated with the offer.

prix.description: The price of the item or service.

dateEvenement.description: The specific date and time for 'evenement' type offers.

photos.description: An array of URLs to photos associated with the offer.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created this offer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the offer was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the offer was last updated.

isActive.description: A flag indicating if the offer is currently active.

definition.description: Stores user profiles including their favorites list.
